title: Squirrel Removal Old Westbury, Long Island | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Old Westbury, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Licensed experts serving Old Westbury estates. Call today!
intro: Old Westbury's beautiful estates and tree-lined properties provide ideal habitats for squirrels, but when they invade attics and crawl spaces, they can cause serious damage. Best Pest Control NYC offers professional squirrel removal services throughout Old Westbury, protecting your home from these persistent rodents. Our experienced technicians provide humane removal, exclusion, and preventative solutions tailored to Long Island properties.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Old Westbury's prestigious residential community, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique pest challenges faced by estate homes and historic properties. Our licensed professionals use humane, effective methods that protect both your property and Long Island's wildlife, with same-day emergency services available throughout Nassau County.
localContext: Old Westbury's expansive properties, mature oak and maple trees, and proximity to the SUNY Old Westbury campus create perfect conditions for squirrel populations to thrive. The village's historic estates and large attic spaces in colonial and Tudor-style homes are particularly vulnerable to squirrel intrusions, especially during fall and winter nesting seasons.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Old Westbury?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Old Westbury typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. Larger estates with multiple access points or significant attic damage may require more extensive work. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What signs indicate squirrels in my Old Westbury home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in attics or walls, especially during early morning and evening hours, visible entry holes near rooflines or soffits, chewed wood or wiring, nesting materials in attic spaces, and squirrel droppings. You may also notice increased squirrel activity on your roof or along power lines leading to your home.

faqs.question: Are squirrels dangerous to Old Westbury properties?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to homes. They gnaw through electrical wiring creating fire hazards, damage insulation, chew wooden beams and siding, contaminate attics with urine and feces, and create entry points that allow other pests inside. Their constant gnawing can also damage HVAC systems and roofing materials common in Old Westbury's historic homes.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Old Westbury home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency services throughout Old Westbury and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of the infestation. We use humane live traps and one-way exclusion doors, followed by sealing all entry points to prevent future intrusions.
